overall.description: A static cinematic shot from a video game (Hogwarts Legacy) showing a Transfiguration classroom. Students sit at wooden desks in a grand gothic hall with vaulted stone ceilings, while a professor stands at the front. The atmosphere is calm and scholarly with cool, diffused natural lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic castle classroom with vaulted ceilings

agents.ego_description: standing stationary at the rear of the classroom observing the lesson and other students

notable_agents.action: student sitting at desk reading a book and occasionally turning pages
professor standing at the front of the classroom facing the students

entered.detail: ornate stone ribbed vaulting with chandeliers hanging down
wooden desk with books and papers where a student is seated
tall gothic arched windows with stone tracery allowing diffused light
decorative patterned rug running down the center aisle
dark wooden cabinet with glass doors containing books or artifacts

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a steady view of a gothic Transfiguration classroom. A student sits at a wooden desk in the right foreground reading, while a professor stands in the center distance. The room features high vaulted stone ceilings, arched windows, and an ornate central rug, with diffused natural light creating a scholarly atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, cinematic gaze across a grand gothic Transfiguration classroom, preserving a calm and scholarly atmosphere throughout. It begins with a focused view of a student reading at a wooden desk in the right foreground, while the professor remains a distant figure at the center of the hall. The perspective then encompasses the vastness of the room, drawing the eye upward toward the high vaulted stone ceilings and arched windows. Finally, the scene settles on the ornate central rug and the diffused natural light that fills the space, emphasizing the stillness of the academic environment.
